title: Firstmother
content:
{{Top|leg}}
In [[M'shinn]]i culture, '''Firstmother''' was the title given to the [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Gender/Legends|women]] of the extinct M'shinni precursor [[Species/Legends|species]] who first entered into a symbiotic relationship with plants. The descendants of the Firstmothers became a distinct species of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] animals almost completely covered with [[Moss/Legends|moss]]-like plants.

Each Firstmother was the founder of a clan of M'shinni, called a [[Rootline]]. These Rootlines became the basis for the organization of M'shinni culture and politics.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-09-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''
